projectName: Pydantic Extra Equality Code And Test Validation

quick: grep -Fq "[tool.pytest.ini_options]" pyproject.toml && grep -Fq "testpaths = 'tests'" pyproject.toml && grep -Fq "name = 'pydantic'" pyproject.toml

python3 -c "import pathlib; text=pathlib.Path('pydantic/main.py').read_text(); assert 'self_type is other_type' in text; assert '(self.__pydantic_extra__ or {}) == (other.__pydantic_extra__ or {})' in text"
full: grep -Fq "def test_extra_equality_runtime_override()" tests/test_main.py && grep -Fq "extra='allow'" tests/test_main.py && grep -Fq "extra='forbid'" tests/test_main.py
